# PERF-225 positive: double full-buffer clone
lang: go
file: PERF-225-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "slices"

func Finalize(buf []byte) []byte {
	owned := slices.Clone(buf)
	// Redundant second full clone of the same logical buffer.
	signed := slices.Clone(owned)
	return signed
}
